channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nigerian community reports over 100 deaths linked to xenophobic violence in South Africa
item.description: Nigerian community leaders for South Africa, under groups like Nigerian Union South Africa (NUSA) and Nigerian Citizens Association South Africa (NICASA), don report say at least 105 Nigerians don los...

item.title: North-Central APC Forum Withdraws Ultimatum and Apologises to Party Chairman Yilwatda
item.description: The North-Central All Progressives Congress (APC) Forum has officially withdrawn its earlier ultimatum demanding the resignation of the party’s National Chairman, Prof. Nentawe Yilwatda. The group had...

item.title: Senate President Praises Tinubu’s Economic Reforms and Development Projects
item.description: The Senate President, Godswill Akpabio, don praise President Bola Tinubu for the bold economic steps wey him don take to stabilize Nigeria’s economy. According to Akpabio, the removal of fuel subsidy ...

item.title: Tinubu says subsidy removal helped Nigeria avoid bankruptcy and boost economic recovery
item.description: President Bola Tinubu tok say the removal of fuel subsidy, even though e cause plenty wahala and litigation, na the move wey save Nigeria from wahala of bankruptcy. During a Sallah celebration with go...

item.title: Local MPPs Request Provincial Support to Prevent Closure of House of Hope Shelter
item.description: Local Members of Provincial Parliament (MPPs) in London are calling on the Ontario government to provide funding to prevent the closure of the House of Hope, a vital shelter for people experiencing ho...

item.title: Proposed US legislation targeting Chinese-linked carmakers could also affect Mercedes-Benz operations
item.description: A bipartisan proposal in the US House of Representatives, known as the Motor Vehicle Modernisation Act of 2026, seeks to restrict the influence of countries deemed adversaries, including China, Russia...

item.title: Australia extends temporary fuel stockholding relief amid global supply uncertainty
item.description: Australia’s Energy Minister Chris Bowen has announced the extension of temporary fuel flexibility measures designed to support supply stability amid ongoing global market pressures. Speaking in Sydney...

item.title: Experts warn of increasing sexism and harassment in Australian schools affecting teachers and students
item.description: Experts have raised concerns about a noticeable increase in sexist behaviour within Australian schools, with reports indicating that female teachers and female students are increasingly being targeted...

item.title: Solutions for a More Reliable and Affordable Philippine Electricity Grid
item.description: Electricity in the Philippines remains expensive despite frequent blackouts, and simply building more power plants is not the solution. Experts argue that the country needs a more flexible and decentr...

item.title: Rising Fuel Prices Prompt Australians to Change Travel Habits
item.description: A recent surge in fuel prices has significantly altered how Australians travel, according to a Monash University survey of over 2,000 adults. Nearly half of respondents reported changing their travel ...

item.title: Marigold Infrastructure Partners fined $120,000 after worker injured on Edmonton Valley Line West LRT site in 2023
item.description: Marigold Infrastructure Partners Inc., the company responsible for building the west leg of Edmonton’s Valley Line LRT, has been fined $120,000 following a workplace injury that occurred on June 23, 2...

item.title: Undiscovered African Destinations Worth Exploring
item.description: Africa is a continent full of surprises, offering more than the usual tourist hotspots. Beyond the well-trodden paths of Morocco, Egypt, Tanzania, and Mauritius, several lesser-known destinations offe...

item.title: How Smoking Affects Your Body and the Healing Benefits When You Quit
item.description: Smoking has immediate and profound effects on the human body, not just long-term risks. Each cigarette stresses the heart, tightens blood vessels, and deprives the body of oxygen due to carbon monoxid...

item.title: Tinubu commissions four CNG infrastructure projects to boost clean transport in Nigeria
item.description: President Bola Tinubu has commissioned four major Compressed Natural Gas (CNG) infrastructure projects across Lagos, Abuja, and Owerri in a coordinated rollout aimed at strengthening Nigeria’s clean e...

item.title: Overview of New Video Game Releases Including '007 First Light' and Other Adventures
item.description: CNN's entertainment segment highlights several notable video game releases this week. The new James Bond title, '007 First Light', marks the return of the iconic spy to interactive gaming, offering pl...

item.title: Fourth New Glenn Rocket Destroyed in Static Fire Test at Cape Canaveral
item.description: On May 29, 2026, during a scheduled static fire test at Cape Canaveral's SLC-36, Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket NG-4 suffered a catastrophic explosion immediately after ignition of its seven BE-4 engi...

item.title: Beneficial Mutations Are More Common, but Changing Environments Limit Their Impact
item.description: A new study from the University of Michigan challenges a long-standing assumption in evolutionary biology: that most genetic changes are neutral. Led by evolutionary biologist Jianzhi Zhang, the resea...

item.title: Majority of Indian births in 2024 were first children with recommended birth spacing of 36 months
item.description: According to the 2024 Sample Registration System (SRS) Statistical Report, nearly two-thirds (66.4%) of live births in India were first-born children. Fourth-order and higher births accounted for only...

item.title: Newly Discovered Patagonian Raptor Suggests Heron-Like Fishing Behavior in Late Cretaceous Dinosaurs
item.description: Paleontologists have identified a new species of raptor-like dinosaur, named Kank australis, that lived approximately 70 million years ago in what is now southern Patagonia, Argentina. The discovery i...

item.title: Stakeholders Call for Better Standards and Safety in Digital Transportation Services
item.description: Transport service providers na wananchi wanaona kuna haja ya kuboresha huduma za digital transport. Wanaona kuna changamoto nyingi kama ubora wa huduma kutokuwepo kwa uhakika, usalama wa abiria na mad...
